vocab.meaning: không gian tĩnh lặng để suy ngẫm
vocab.example: I view art galleries as a contemplative space where one can escape the frenetic pace of modern life.
The best exhibitions are those that provoke thought and challenge our societal norms.

vocab.meaning: sự đan xen/tương tác giữa các bề mặt chất liệu
vocab.example: I was fascinated by the interplay of textures in the mixed-media installations on display.

vocab.meaning: sức mạnh gợi cảm xúc/liên tưởng
vocab.example: One cannot deny the evocative power of abstract art to stir deep-seated emotions within the viewer.

vocab.meaning: tay nghề thủ công/kỹ thuật chế tác vô song
vocab.example: The gallery featured several Renaissance sculptures that exhibited unparalleled craftsmanship.
Seeing a masterpiece of such monumental scale in person is a far more moving experience than viewing it on a screen.
Art galleries play a pivotal role in preserving our cultural heritage for future generations.

vocab.meaning: sự giải mã/hiểu một cách tinh tế và đa chiều
vocab.example: Each visitor brings their own history to the gallery, leading to a highly nuanced interpretation of the works.

vocab.meaning: sự gắn kết/thống nhất về mặt chủ đề
vocab.example: I particularly enjoyed the thematic coherence of the exhibition, which focused on environmental degradation.
I feel that galleries with too many rigid rules can sometimes stifle creativity and the raw connection between art and the audience.
